trust.name: gradle
trust.reason: The Gradle source distribution (gradle-*-src.zip) is downloaded only by IDEs to display Gradle API sources; the Gradle runtime itself comes from the wrapper distribution, so this is not part of the build or runtime classpath and is trusted rather than pinned.

trust.name: groovy
trust.reason: Gradle's bundled Groovy is supplied by the Gradle distribution at build time and is not part of the build or runtime classpath; only the IDE resolves this artifact from a repository to display its sources, so its metadata is trusted rather than pinned.
Javadoc jars are downloaded only by IDEs for code insight; they never join the build or runtime classpath, so they are trusted by name rather than pinned.
Sources jars are downloaded only by IDEs for code insight; they never join the build or runtime classpath, so they are trusted by name rather than pinned.
